name: Venice Shoreline Crips
description: The Venice Shoreline Crips (VSLC) are a Crip set based in Venice's Oakwood neighborhood — originally a 'servant's zone' and one of the few places near California's coastline where blacks could own property. Founded in the late 1960s-early 1970s alongside the original Crip gangs. Warred with Culver City 13 and Venice 13 over the drug trade in the 1990s. In 1980, a member murdered Senator Abraham Ribicoff's niece.
